---
title: &TITLE Davide De Martini ##
last: De Martini ##
first: Davide ##
people_group: "phdstudent" ## "postdoc | gradstudent | alumni | pi | student" #
email: davide.demartini@unitn.it ##
education:
  - MS in Artificial Intellicence Systems | University of Trento | 2025  <br> BS in Information Engineering | University of Trento | 2023 
subtitle: "PhD student" ## "Postdoctoral Fellow | Graduate Student | Principal Investigator | Student | Alumni" #
description: "" ## Short description (optional) ##
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:davide.demartini@unitn.it 
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard 
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=or6CzwMAAAAJ&hl=it
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/davidedema
---

<hr>


:::{#about}


Davide De Martini is a PhD student at the university of Trento. He received the B.S. degree in computer science at the University of Trento, Italy, in 2023 and the M.S. in artificial intelligence systems at the University of Trento, Italy, in 2025. His research focuses on planning and control of quadrupedal locomotion.



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
